message:
fix(sync): skip unhealthy idle resources during try_acquire with health checks

When health_check_on_acquire is enabled, try_acquire previously returned
the first idle resource without checking its health. Now it loops through
idle resources, running the health check on each one, and discards any
that fail (decrementing the active counter since try_get_idle increments
it). Returns the first healthy resource found, or None if all idle
resources are unhealthy.

This prevents callers from receiving stale or broken connections from the
pool when using the non-blocking acquisition path.

Test added: try_acquire_skips_unhealthy_idle_resources_when_health_check_enabled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
